Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants me to analyze a provided event log of a support workflow identify recurring activities within the same case that have different meanings based on context rename them to be more descriptive present the revised log and justify the naming choices

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case C001 Initiate Request Start Verify Documents First check incomplete Call Customer Request missing docs Submit Additional Customer action Verify Documents Second check after submission This is a recurrence Approve Request End Case C002 Initiate Request Start Verify Documents Standard check Call Customer Clarify discrepancy Adjust Account Internal fix Call Customer Confirm fix This is a recurrence Approve Request End Case C003 Initiate Request Walk in Verify Documents Physical check Call Customer Customer stepped out Adjust Account Internal correction Verify Documents Re verify after adjustment This is a recurrence Approve Request End

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify Recurring Activities and Contextual Differences Activity Verify Documents Instance 1 General Initial verification C001 Agent checks identity documents Result Incomplete Missing C002 Identity verification Standard C003 Physical verification of ID Standard Instance 2 C001 and C003 Second verification C001 Agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided This is a re verification after a specific exception missing docs provided C003 Re verify docs after account adjustment This is a re verification necessitated by a change in account status Activity Call Customer Instance 1 C001 Verification incomplete agent calls to request missing docs Purpose Request Info Exception handling C002 Outbound call to clarify account discrepancy Purpose Clarification Issue resolution C003 Customer stepped out Officer calls to have them return Purpose Recall customer logistics Instance 2 C002 only C002 Follow up call to confirm adjustments made Purpose Confirmation Closure communication

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Develop Renaming Strategy Verify Documents First pass Needs to indicate it is the initial check Initial Document Verification Second pass C001 Needs to indicate it is checking new info Re verify Updated Documents Second pass C003 Needs to indicate it follows an adjustment Re verify Documents Post Adjustment Or generally Secondary Document Verification

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait can I generalize better Renaming Verify Documents to Initial Verification versus Re Verification is a strong distinction Context for C001 second instance Submit Additional precedes it Verify Additional Documents Context for C003 second instance Adjust Account precedes it Re Verify Documents Post Adjustment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets look at Call Customer C001 first Call to Request Missing Documents C002 first Call to Clarify Discrepancy C002 second Call to Confirm Adjustments C003 first Call to Recall Customer Constraint Check The prompt asks to rename activities so that their names clearly reflect their contextual differences Specific names are better here than generic Call 1 and Call 2

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the New Names Iterative Refinement C001 Verify Documents 1 Initial Document Verification Call Customer Call to Request Missing Docs Verify Documents 2 Verify Resubmitted Documents C002 Verify Documents Initial Document Verification Call Customer 1 Call to Clarify Account Discrepancy Call Customer 2 Call to Confirm Resolution C003 Verify Documents 1 In Person Document Verification Call Customer Call to Recall Walk in Customer Verify Documents 2 Re Verify Documents After Account Update

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Some names might be getting too long Lets try to be concise but distinct Verify Documents Instance 1 Initial Document Verification Instance 2 C001 Verification of Resubmitted Documents Instance 2 C003 Re verification of Documents Call Customer C001 Call for Missing Information C002 1 Call for Discrepancy Resolution C002 2 Confirmation Call C003 Call to Recall Customer This looks solid I will implement these

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Formatting the Output I need a table for the revised log and a text section for the justification Writing the Justification For Verify Documents Differentiate between the initial screening and the secondary checks required due to process loops exception handling or account adjustments For Call Customer Differentiate based on intent soliciting info versus resolving issues versus confirming resolution versus logistics

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review of the Revised Log C001 Verify Documents Initial Document Verification Call Customer Call to Request Missing Documents Verify Documents Verify Resubmitted Documents C002 Verify Documents Initial Document Verification Call Customer Call to Clarify Discrepancy Call Customer Call to Confirm Resolution C003 Verify Documents In Person Document Verification Call Customer Call to Recall Customer Verify Documents Re Verify Documents Post Adjustment This covers all recurring events and makes the log much more readable

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining C003 Verify Documents first instance Is In Person better or just Initial The prompt emphasizes context C001 and C002 are WebPortal C003 is BranchReception The activity is physically different In Person Document Verification captures that context well Refining C001 Verify Documents second instance Context is specifically re checks documents now that ID scan is provided Verify Resubmitted Documents is precise Refining C003 Verify Documents second instance Context is Re verify docs after account adjustment Re Verify Documents Post Adjustment is precise Refining Call Customer C001 Request missing docs Call to Request Info C002 first Clarify discrepancy Call to Resolve Discrepancy C002 second Confirm adjustments Call to Confirm Changes C003 Have them return Call to Recall Customer This seems balanced
